title: 50-lesson teen milestone
text: fifty lessons done and your fingers are flying. the next 25 lessons turn this speed into sustainable habit. dont stop now — momentum is everything in this part of the journey.
tips: Track your peak — should be 70+ by now

character_tips.anna: 🎯 50 lessons in! Two-thirds done. Final stretch coming.
character_tips.maxim: Halfway+? Track your peak. Final block is application.
